zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Douglas於1398年出生在蘇格蘭維托史爾莫申盧姆時，她的父親Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas29歲，母親Lady Margaret Stewart28歲。她和Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1448年在英國蘇格蘭享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Douglas was born in 1398, in Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Scotland, her father, Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas, was 29 and her mother, Lady Margaret Stewart, was 28. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton. She died in 1448, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Douglas est née en 1398, à Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Écosse, son père, Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Stewart, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton. Elle est décédée en 1448, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Douglas 1398 in Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Stewart 28. Sie hatte mit Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1448 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Douglas è nata il nel 1398 nel Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Scotland, sua padre, Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Stewart, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton. Morì nel 1448, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Douglas(이)가 1398년 스컷랜드 위그타운실르 모크럼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Stewart(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Douglas родилась в 1398 г. в местности мочрум, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Stewart, 28.
